## Checklist

- [ ] No new runtime dependencies introduced (stdlib only)
- [ ] Manifest templates and host-discovery copies are in sync (doctor reports no drift)
- [ ] `README.md` / docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
